name: Molly: fear of clowns
short_description: Molly: fear of clowns - Platformer in a classic style and with modern graphics. The adventures of a little girl named Molly, inside her fictional world of fears and fantasies.
detailed_description:
Molly: fear of clowns - Platformer in a classic style and with modern graphics. The adventures of a little girl named Molly, inside her fictional world of fears and fantasies.

Molly has been suffering from coulrophobia, a fear of clowns, since childhood. Constant visions and terrible dreams frighten the little girl. One day she is lost in her fictional world. Help Molly to get out and overcome the fear of clowns.
about_the_game:

Molly has been suffering from coulrophobia, a fear of clowns, since childhood. Constant visions and terrible dreams frighten the little girl. One day she is lost in her fictional world. Help Molly to get out and overcome the fear of clowns.
supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Russian, Ukrainian
